{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206582193E85CBD517D1973C0A2"}"},"total":1902},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485729459337904958","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材很不错啊，写的很好，就是怎么不给主角也来个果实啊，可惜了，这样能借系统强化到最高级，怕海水可以加个设定果实能力最高级免疫海楼石"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742910137,"group_id":"7481622393023122456","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6V5BH3cvlODBY3XOe4H9D8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cdeeed58e46b4fba8d55ce1ccb739da6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707244&x-signature=kHQgyRplTYzgCHLpsopgC6%2BeBE8%3D","user_id":"104432468667","user_name":"忍界大战由我开启"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104432468667","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7481622393023122456","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局兵变+无敌纯爽+海贼版终极魅魔】
穿越海贼世界，通过六年时间成功夺取元帅之位的夏煜意气风发的站在马林梵多广场。
在他前方，海军本部三大将以及以祗园为首的本部中将少将准将和本部十万士兵整齐而立。
萨卡斯基：“全体都有，向元帅大人敬礼！”
“忠！诚！”
十万士兵洪亮而整齐的大喊声中，夏煜向前一步：“各位，这份荣光我不会独享。”
“我坚信，清除旧时代的歪风邪气，建设自由平等的新世界是我们生活在这个时代的伟大使命！”
“天龙人享有一切特权的时代该结束了，罪恶滔天的海贼也需要被肃清，为了正义！”
本书又名【海贼：马林梵多之春】【身为海军元帅，岂能久居人下】【海贼：这份荣光我不会独享】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e993df07c30ba9316e007d0ff4ce5904","author":"大佛洗脚","author_id":"","book_id":"7481622393023122456","book_name":"顶上兵变，向元帅大人献上忠诚","book_short_name":"马林梵多之春","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#982818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7481622445263159832","read_count":"47324","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1152102"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"505","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,海贼,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1fd1cce34caefb57abc68fa62881efd1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317901&x-signature=aH8EoiONkmZP726Byzz1fBAvN1Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"66144854164","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206582193E85CBD517D1973C0A2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读41分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":62
